comments.text: There is a paper on arxiv On the maximum ratio between chromatic number and clique number which claims that by running through the arguments of [Er67c], the bounds are actually $\log^2 2 \cdot [1/4,4]$ not $\log^2 2 \cdot [1/4,1]$. The paper also claimes to lower the upper bound from $4$ to some $c<3.72$ . (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
